response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and relevant AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience at current role. Strong background in testing, DevOps, and architecture across multiple domains. Main gaps are explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience not called out, and Kotlin/Java is light (older Java work only), but the foundation is strong enough to warrant an interview.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple companies
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing/TDD culture, workshop instruction, and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) background
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin experience absent; Java experience is dated (pre-2011) and limited in scope
Heavy investment in niche DLang ecosystem may indicate divergence from mainstream enterprise tooling
